name: Alliance Bioenergy Plus, Inc.
summary: Alliance Bioenergy Plus, Inc., through its subsidiaries, focuses on technologies in the renewable energy, biofuels, and bioplastics technologies sectors. It also holds license to the patented technology Cellulose-to-Sugar (CTS 2.0), a mechanical/chemical dry process for converting cellulose material into sugar for use in the biofuels industry. The company was formerly known as Alliance Media Group Holdings, Inc. and changed its name to Alliance Bioenergy Plus, Inc. in December 2014. Alliance Bioenergy Plus, Inc. was incorporated in 2012 and is based in Palm Beach Gardens, Florida.
